notes: Can also be used as an adjective meaning 'actual' or 'real' (e.g. der eigentliche Grund = the actual reason). As an adverb, it often softens questions or expresses mild contradiction.

sentences.german: Eigentlich wollte ich heute früh aufstehen, aber ich habe verschlafen.
sentences.english: Actually, I wanted to get up early today, but I overslept.
What do you actually do for work?
